name.label: Name
name.description: An optional label shown on the node in the editor.

method.label: Method
method.description: The HTTP method this node listens for.

url.label: URL
url.description: The path to listen on, such as /hello or /user/:id.

out.label: Request
out.description: One message per incoming HTTP request — the payload and a snapshot of the request (method, url, headers, query, params, body). Wire the output to an http-out node to send the reply.
